use_cases: Displaying team members or collaborators in a horizontal stack of avatar chips
Showing selected users or filters in a compact chip format
Rendering user mentions with avatars in comment or review sections
Presenting contact lists or participant lists with initials or image avatars
Creating skill tags or category filters with associated user avatars
ai_summary: A reusable Avatar Chips component built with Material UI that displays multiple user avatars in a horizontal chip layout. Supports image URLs or initial letter fallbacks, three color variants (blue, green, gray), filled or outlined styling, dark mode, and click handlers for each chip. Perfect for SaaS dashboards, team displays, or any interface needing compact user representation with interactive capabilities.
